description_long: This is a countertop electric mixer with a robust, retro-inspired design, featuring a green and white color scheme. The main body is constructed from a smooth, hard plastic or metal, with a large, metallic mixing bowl attached at the front. A prominent control knob and a button are located on the right side of the chassis, allowing for manual adjustment of mixing speed and operation. The top section is rounded and streamlined, giving the appliance a modern yet classic appearance. The mixing bowl is detachable and sits securely in a recessed base, with a visible central spindle for attaching mixing implements. The overall build suggests durability and ease of cleaning, suitable for frequent use in kitchens or food preparation areas.
description: A green and white countertop electric mixer with a large metallic mixing bowl and a rounded, retro-modern design. Features a prominent control knob and a detachable bowl for easy use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the control knob, button, and the full profile of the mixing bowl attached to the main body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded back of the chassis and the narrow profile of the mixer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bowl and the smooth, uninterrupted chassis surface without visible controls.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open mouth of the metallic mixing bowl and the central spindle for mixing attachments.
attribute_control_panel_type: analog dial with a single button
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with a rounded, streamlined form and integrated base
